name: Claude Code NARP Runtime
summary: Set up Claude Code as a formal NextClaw runtime entry through narp-stdio(acp), with Runtime default and NextClaw model selection, launcher repair, readiness checks, and real smoke.

summaryI18n.en: Set up Claude Code as a formal NextClaw runtime entry through narp-stdio(acp), with Runtime default and NextClaw model selection, launcher repair, readiness checks, and real smoke.
summaryI18n.zh: 把 Claude Code 通过 narp-stdio(acp) 接成正式 NextClaw runtime，支持 Runtime default 与 NextClaw 模型选择，并覆盖 launcher 修复、就绪检查和真实冒烟。

description: Use this skill when Claude Code should become a pluggable NextClaw session type instead of a PATH prerequisite, command-line switch, or core hardcoded provider branch. The skill owns cold-start setup, runtime entry repair, diagnostics, and first real reply validation.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when Claude Code should become a pluggable NextClaw session type instead of a PATH prerequisite, command-line switch, or core hardcoded provider branch. The skill owns cold-start setup, runtime entry repair, diagnostics, and first real reply validation.
descriptionI18n.zh: 当需要把 Claude Code 接成可插拔的 NextClaw 会话类型，而不是要求用户准备 PATH、命令行开关或在核心系统硬编码 provider 分支时使用。该技能负责冷启动接入、runtime entry 修复、诊断和首次真实回复验证。

author: NextClaw
